$schema_note: Per-provider tolerance overrides for the 35-fixture suite. Consumed by JottyTests/AI/ProviderToleranceConfig.swift and the FixtureComparator (greedy bipartite + Jaccard) introduced in Phase 3 §5.

baseline.rationale: Apple FM tends to keep titles concise. 0.6 Jaccard tolerates synonym/word-order drift while still catching topic-shift hallucinations. Length ratio guards against stop-word inflation.

ollama-qwen2.5-3b.notes: 3B model; slightly more verbose titles. Hallucinates duration→timeBlock — guardrail required.

ollama-phi3.5-3.8b.notes: Tends to over-summarise; widen length lower bound.

claude-haiku-4-5.notes: Cloud model; verbose titles with action verbs. Wider tolerance — release-blocker dims (3,4,6) still must pass.

gpt-4o-mini.notes: Strict structured outputs; titles can be expansive. Same tolerance as Claude.

gemini-2.5-flash.notes: Aggressive expansion of bullet text into titles. Looser bound; safety filter may emit guardrail refusals on edge fixtures — track separately.

release_blocker_dimensions.dim_6_hallucination_rate: 100% pass — no fabricated tasks not present in source text
